items.title: Stop-sequence detection during streaming
items.scenario: An LLM streams tokens; you must stop the moment the response contains a configured stop string like '\n\nUser:'.
items.explanation: A sliding window of length `len(stop)` over the last few characters detects the match in O(n) total over the whole stream.

items.title: Longest unique substring in a generated answer
items.scenario: Detect the longest contiguous span of unique tokens — a quick repetition diagnostic.
items.explanation: Variable-size window: expand while no duplicate; on duplicate, shrink l past the previous occurrence. O(n).

items.title: Chunk overlap during ingestion
items.scenario: Consecutive RAG chunks share a tail/prefix overlap to preserve context; you need to find the largest shared prefix/suffix to dedup.
items.explanation: Two-pointer scan from chunk A's tail and chunk B's head — O(min(|A|, |B|)) and avoids the O(n²) suffix-array build.

items.title: Rolling latency in dashboards
items.scenario: Maintain the average inference latency over the last 1000 calls.
items.explanation: Fixed-size sliding window of length 1000: add the new value, remove the oldest, update running sum — O(1) per update.

items.title: Partition long sequences for batching
items.scenario: Reorder a list of (id, length) tuples so all 'long' sequences sit together for efficient padding.
items.explanation: Two-pointer same-direction partition: `slow` marks the boundary; `fast` scans and swaps long items left. O(n), in place.
